layers.title: Add success tracker
layers.summary: The PR introduces a request-driven URMA success-rate tracker with atomic counters, fixed-window settlement, single-switch gating, and failed-switch backoff. Build metadata is updated so the tracker is linked into the client library for both Bazel and CMake builds.

layers.title: Record URMA outcomes
layers.summary: On top of the tracker, the client worker API gains internal hooks for recording data-plane outcomes and completing switch attempts. Set/Publish UB writes and Get responses now feed success, TCP fallback, and K_URMA_ERROR signals into the tracker.

layers.title: Switch current worker
layers.summary: The object client wires tracker triggers into the existing asynchronous worker-switch machinery. A new URMA_DATA_PLANE_FAILURE reason keeps the current worker usable during failed failover attempts, preserving foreground traffic through TCP fallback while discovery looks for another worker.

layers.title: Expose hot gflags
layers.summary: This cohort adds two runtime-tunable gflags: a success-rate threshold and a minimum sample count. Validation constrains the threshold to finite values in [0.0, 1.0] and rejects a zero sample floor, while the client flags monitor allowlist makes both settings hot-updatable.

layers.title: Document client flags
layers.summary: The user-facing Chinese client environment guide now describes the new hot-updatable URMA failover parameters and their ranges. The conversation trace records the original implementation request and is documentation-only metadata for this PR.
layers.diff:
+## 客户端运行参数
+
+以下 gflag 参数可通过 `DATASYSTEM_CLIENT_CONFIG_PATH` 配置文件设置，支持热更新。
+
+| 序号 | 名称 | 默认值 | 取值范围 | 含义/用途 |
+|------|------|--------|----------|-----------|
+| 29 | `urma_failover_success_rate_ratio` | `0.5` | `[0.0, 1.0]` | Client 侧 URMA 数据面成功率阈值。一个完整统计窗口的成功率严格低于该 ratio 时，client 尝试切换 worker；设置为 `0.0` 表示关闭 URMA 故障切换功能，同时清空当前窗口状态。 |
+| 30 | `urma_failover_min_sample_count` | `5` | `> 0` | 每个 `client_dead_timeout_s` 统计窗口内进行故障切换判断前所需的最小 URMA 数据面样本数。样本不足时即使成功率很低也不会触发切换，避免少量请求误触发。 |
+4.客户端运行参数通过 `DATASYSTEM_CLIENT_CONFIG_PATH` 配置文件设置。
+{"type": "user", "uuid": "u1", "parentUuid": null, "timestamp": "2026-06-11T09:00:37.000Z", "message": {"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": "We keep losing latency when a client's URMA (RDMA) data plane goes bad

layers.title: Validate tracker state
layers.summary: Unit tests cover the tracker gates before it is used by the full client path. They exercise full-window settlement, minimum samples, strict threshold semantics, disable-and-clear behavior, failed-switch backoff, healthy-window reset, and concurrent boundary triggering.
layers.diff:
+ds_cc_test(
+    name = "urma_success_rate_tracker_test",
+    srcs = ["urma_success_rate_tracker_test.cpp"],
+    deps = [
+        "//src/datasystem/client:urma_success_rate_tracker",
+        "//src/datasystem/common/flags:ds_flags",
+        "//src/datasystem/common/log:common_log",
+        "//tests/ut:ut_common",
+    ],
+)
+TEST_F(UrmaSuccessRateTrackerTest, DoesNotTriggerBeforeFullWindow)
+TEST_F(UrmaSuccessRateTrackerTest, RequiresMinimumSampleCount)
+TEST_F(UrmaSuccessRateTrackerTest, UsesStrictThreshold)
+TEST_F(UrmaSuccessRateTrackerTest, ConcurrentBoundaryTriggersOnlyOnce)

layers.title: Exercise KV failover
layers.summary: System tests extend coverage from the isolated tracker into KV client service discovery and worker switching. The suite covers local UDS non-triggering, remote UB fallback, Get-side TCP fallback and K_URMA_ERROR, failed-switch keep-current behavior, hot config updates, healthy backoff reset, and local recovery switchback.
layers.diff:
+ds_cc_test(
+    name = "kv_client_urma_failover_test",
+    srcs = ["kv_client_urma_failover_test.cpp"],
+    tags = ["manual"],
+    deps = KV_COMMON_DEPS + [
+        "//src/datasystem/client:urma_success_rate_tracker",
+        "//src/datasystem/client:service_discovery",
+        "//src/datasystem/common/flags:ds_flags",
+    ],
+)
+TEST_F(KVClientUrmaFailoverTest, LEVEL1_RemoteUbFallbackSwitchByDiscovery)
+TEST_F(KVClientUrmaFailoverTest, LEVEL1_RemoteGetTcpFallbackSwitchByDiscovery)
+TEST_F(KVClientUrmaFailoverTest, LEVEL1_RemoteSwitchFailureKeepsCurrentWorkerAvailable)
+TEST_F(KVClientUrmaFailoverTest, LEVEL1_DynamicThresholdUpdateAppliesAtWindowSettlement)
+TEST_F(KVClientUrmaFailoverTest, LEVEL1_LocalFailRemoteFailThenSwitchBack)

summary: This PR adds client-side URMA data-plane health tracking that can asynchronously fail over to another worker while preserving current-worker availability through TCP fallback.
